entry.content: Current Prism already compresses multi-artifact meaning through target-scoped views such as worksets and validation recipes, but those groupings do not yet have durable concept identity. A semantic codec should therefore be a first-class concept layer built on projections/query surfaces rather than a rename of existing per-target bundles.

metadata.implication: Concept packets should have stable handles and decode lenses while reusing workset, validation, impact, and memory/outcome surfaces as decode material.
